title: 50-entry curated arsenal (of planned 1,000)
public_claim: 50-entry curated arsenal (of planned 1,000) is a method packet for this package is the handoff wrapper around a larger, unfinished project: a conversational corpus that grew to a claimed 1,000 sophisticated expressions/allusions across mythology, literature, philosophy, military strategy, political strategy, psychological warfare, covert operations, historical conspiracies, and political.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is method operationalization: name the analytic technique, define its use condition, connect it to a case or judgment problem, record failure modes, and decide whether it is a live method page or a reference packet.
